recommendations.title: Lucky Luke: The Ballad of the Daltons
recommendations.overview: The Dalton brothers are to receive their dead uncle's fortune if they eliminate the judge and jury responsible for his execution. And to accomplish this task, they must enlist the help of Lucky Luke.
recommendations.director: Henri Gruel, Pierre Watrin, Morris, René Goscinny

recommendations.title: The Twelve Tasks of Asterix
recommendations.overview: Asterix and Obelix depart on an adventure to complete twelve impossible tasks to prove to Caesar that they are as strong as the Gods. You'll roar with laughter as they outwit, outrun, and generally outrage the very people who are trying to prove them

recommendations.title: Asterix and Cleopatra
recommendations.overview: Popular animated hero Asterix and his faithful sidekick Obelix travel to ancient Egypt to help Cleopatra build a new summer home. Cleopatra and Julius Caesar have made a bet, with Caesar wagering the project cannot be completed in a few weeks time. W

recommendations.title: Lucky Luke
recommendations.overview: Lucky Luke becomes the Sheriff of Daisy Town and runs out all the criminals. Then the Dalton brothers arrive and try to get the Indians to break the peace treaty and attack the town.

recommendations.title: Spirit Untamed
recommendations.overview: Lucky Prescott's life is changed forever when she moves from her home in the city to a small frontier town and befriends a wild mustang named Spirit.

recommendations.title: Lucky Luke
recommendations.overview: Fearless gunslinger, Lucky Luke, is ordered by the President to bring peace to Daisy Town.

recommendations.title: The Curious Case of Benjamin Button
recommendations.overview: Born under unusual circumstances, Benjamin Button springs into being as an elderly man in a New Orleans nursing home and ages in reverse. Twelve years after his birth, he meets Daisy, a child who flits in and out of his life as she grows up to be a d

recommendations.title: The Ballad of Cable Hogue
recommendations.overview: Double-crossed and left without water in the desert, Cable Hogue is saved when he finds a spring. It is in just the right spot for a much needed rest stop on the local stagecoach line, and Hogue uses this to his advantage. He builds a house and makes

recommendations.title: The Far Country
recommendations.overview: During the Klondike Gold Rush, a misanthropic cattle driver and his talkative elderly partner run afoul of the law in Alaska and are forced to work for a saloon owner to take her supplies into a newly booming but lawless Candian town.

recommendations.title: Calamity Jane
recommendations.overview: Sharpshooter Calamity Jane takes it upon herself to recruit a famous actress and bring her back to the local saloon, but jealousy soon gets in the way.
